user.title: Connect to Beem Energy
user.description: Enter your Beem Energy account credentials.

data_description.email: The email address used for your Beem Energy account.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Beem Energy. Please check your network.
error.no_devices_found: No Beem batteries found on this account.

abort.already_configured: This Beem Energy account is already configured.

data_description.location_lat: Latitude of your installation. Leave blank to use Home Assistant's configured location.
data_description.location_lon: Longitude of your installation. Leave blank to use Home Assistant's configured location.
data_description.solcast_api_key: API key for Solcast solar forecasting (optional).
data_description.tariff_default_price: Default electricity price in EUR/kWh (used when not in any configured tariff period).
data_description.tariff_period_count: Number of tariff periods to configure (1-6). Each period has a time range and price.

solcast.title: Solcast Site IDs
solcast.description: Assign a Solcast Site ID to each solar array. Create sites at toolkit.solcast.com.au matching your array configurations.

data_description.solcast_site_0_id: Solcast resource ID for solar array 1 (optional).
data_description.solcast_site_1_id: Solcast resource ID for solar array 2 (optional).
data_description.solcast_site_2_id: Solcast resource ID for solar array 3 (optional).
data_description.solcast_site_3_id: Solcast resource ID for solar array 4 (optional).

water_heater.title: Water Heater
water_heater.description: Optionally configure a water heater as a solar surplus diverter.

data_description.water_heater_switch_entity: A switch entity to turn the water heater on/off.
data_description.water_heater_power_entity: A sensor entity that measures water heater power consumption (W).

ev_charger.title: EV Charger
ev_charger.description: Optionally configure an EV charger as a second-priority solar surplus diverter. Requires the water heater to be active first.

data_description.ev_charger_toggle_entity: A switch entity that starts/stops EV charging.
data_description.ev_charger_power_entity: A number entity (6-32A) that controls the wallbox charging amperage.

tariffs.title: Tariff Periods
tariffs.description: Configure your electricity tariff periods. Each period has a label, time range, and price.
